arts.ttl: Pressure on for Man City & PSG - could Champions League exit happen?
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Paris St-Germain on Wednesday with both sides battling to stay in the new-look Champions League - BBC Sport looks at what both teams need and what an early exit could mean.

arts.ttl: Man City accused of encouraging player to break contract
arts.sum: Real Valladolid accuse Manchester City of encouraging one of their players to break his contract to force through a move to the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: When is the UEFA Champions League knockout playoff draw? Man City date, time and rules
arts.sum: Liverpool have already secured a place in the knockout stages of the Champions League while Man City must win both of their last two games in the competition

arts.ttl: PSG vs. Man City confirmed lineups: Savinho, Marquinhos, Hakimi decisions made for Champions League clash
arts.sum: PSG and Manchester City confirm their starting lineups for tonight's Champions League showdown at the Parc des Princes.

arts.ttl: Manchester City Prepares Official Bid for Juventus Star Cambiaso
arts.sum: Manchester City are poised to submit an official transfer offer for Juventus defender Andrea Cambiaso in the coming days, with the club's Champions League performance potentially influencing the timing of the bid. The post Manchester City Prepares Official Bid for Juventus Star Cambiaso appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man City fend off Real Madrid and Inter Milan for LaLiga starlet
arts.sum: “Yesterday afternoon, Abdulai Juma Bah and his agent communicated to Real Valladolid his intention to unilaterally break the contract that binds both parties. Several European clubs have shown an interest in Juma Bah this season - in England, Newcastle United and Leicester City as well as City, Inter Milan in Serie A, Fenerbahçe in Turkey and Real Madrid, who have close ties to Valladolid through Ronaldo Nazário, have also been monitoring his progress.

arts.ttl: Report: Midfielder compared to Toni Kroos now wants to follow Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis to Man City
Kyle Walker to AC Milan: Medical date, transfer details 'revealed' ahead of Man City exit
arts.sum: AC Milan reportedly reach a 'total agreement' with Man City to sign defender Kyle Walker. When will he undergo a medical and finalise his transfer to the Italian giants?

arts.ttl: Savinho, Bernardo return as City make two changes
arts.sum: PSG won 3-0 against FC Salzburg on MD6, registering as many wins and goals as they had across their previous seven games in the UEFA Champions League (W1 D2 L4). Pep Guardiola makes two changes to his starting XI for this evening's crucial Champions League clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: PSG on the brink of Champions League embarrassment
arts.sum: “I hope to have other more important games, but this is a special game because in the new format of the Champions League I don’t think anyone could predict that City would have this number of points ahead of match day seven.” “I hope the most important match is not the one against Manchester City, I hope it will be in the next phase of the competition at a very high level with the trophy at stake,” Luis Enrique explained.
